# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the Docker registry')
        string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: '', description: 'Tag for the Docker image')
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    docker.build("${params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL}/${params.IMAGE_TAG}")
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Push to Docker Registry') {
            steps {
                script {
                    docker.withRegistry("https://"+params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL, 'docker-hub-credentials') {
                        docker.image("${params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL}/${params.IMAGE_TAG}").push()
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
